message:
chore(beads): batch close ~51 completed issues, open 3 new sub-issues

Update issue tracker to reflect the completion of the connector
provisioning automation and test infrastructure sprint.

Approximately 51 issues moved from open/in_progress to closed,
covering completed work across connector provisioning, doctor
diagnostics, operation receipts, integration tests, and E2E
compliance tests.

3 issues moved to in_progress: telegram manifest/capability map,
telegram polling/event streaming, and github provisioning automation.

3 new sub-issues opened for follow-up work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
